_meta.keyKnowledge: We use art techniques, materials and visual conventions to create artworks that communicate ideas and meaning.

_source.w: We use art techniques, materials and visual conventions to create artworks that communicate ideas and meaning.
y: Making art with intention helps us communicate our thoughts and perspectives powerfully.
Learning visual conventions gives us a shared language for creating and discussing art.
Exploring different materials and processes expands our creative possibilities.
eg: We ask 'What visual conventions would best communicate my idea?' when planning our artwork.
We experiment with multiple possibilities before deciding on our final approach.
We use colour, line and shape deliberately to express a feeling or tell a story.
We create a mixed-media artwork that combines drawing, painting and collage.
We plan our artwork using sketches and annotations before starting the final piece.
We create an artwork that shares a perspective on an issue in our community.
